oids.name: zxAnOptModuleIfShutdownUnplugEn
oids.description:
Indicates whether the zxAnOpticalModuleUnpluggedAlm should be 
             generated when the port the optical module plugged in has been 
             shutdown.
             enabled(1) : The zxAnOpticalOfflineTrapEnable indicates whether the 
                 zxAnOpticalModuleUnpluggedAlm should be generated or not.
             disabled(2): The zxAnOpticalModuleUnpluggedAlm should not be 
                 generated.

oids.name: zxAnOptModuleFstUnpluggedRptEn
oids.description:
Indicates whether the zxAnOpticalModuleUnpluggedAlm should be 
             generated when the agent has detected the optical module is offline
             for the first time.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalModuleAlmPrfTable
oids.description: This table includes the optical module threshold profile.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalModuleAlmPrfEntry
oids.description: An entry in zxAnOpticalModuleAlmPrfTable.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalModuleAlmPrfName
oids.description:
A textual string containing information about the
            optical module alarm threshold profile name .

oids.name: zxAnOpticalRxPwrLowerThresh
oids.description:
The lower limit threshold on input optical power.
             The alarm should be generated  when zxAnOpticalIfRxPwrCurrValue
             is lower than this threshold. 
             The unit is 1dBm when the value of opticalAlarmPrfUnit(1) is 1, 
             otherwise the unit is 0.1dBm.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalRxPwrUpperThresh
oids.description:
The upper limit threshold on input optical power. 
             The alarm should be generated when zxAnOpticalIfRxPwrCurrValue
             exceeds this threshold.
             The unit is 1dBm when the value of opticalAlarmPrfUnit(1) is 1, 
             otherwise the unit is 0.1dBm.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalTxPwrLowerThresh
oids.description:
The lower limit threshold on output optical power.
             The alarm should be generated  when zxAnOpticalIfTxPwrCurrValue
             is lower than this threshold. 
             The unit is 1dBm when the value of opticalAlarmPrfUnit(1) is 1, 
             otherwise the unit is 0.1dBm.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalTxPwrUpperThresh
oids.description:
The upper limit threshold on output optical power.
             The alarm should be generated when zxAnOpticalIfTxPwrCurrValue
             exceeds this threshold.
             The unit is 1dBm when the value of opticalAlarmPrfUnit(1) is 1, 
             otherwise the unit is 0.1dBm.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalBiasCurrLowerThresh
oids.description:
The lower limit threshold on optical modules bias
             current.The alarm should be generated  when
             zxAnOpticalBiasCurrent is lower than this threshold.
             The unit is 1mA when the value of opticalAlarmPrfUnit(1) is 1, 
             otherwise the unit is 0.1mA.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalBiasCurrUpperThresh
oids.description:
The upper limit threshold on optical modules bias current.
             The alarm should be generated when zxAnOpticalBiasCurrent 
             exceeds this threshold.
             The unit is 1mA when the value of opticalAlarmPrfUnit(1) is 1, 
             otherwise the unit is 0.1mA.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalTempLowerThresh
oids.description:
The lower limit threshold on optical modules temperature.
             The alarm should be generated  when zxAnOpticalTemperature 
             is lower than this threshold.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalTempUpperThresh
oids.description:
The upper limit threshold on optical modules temperature.
             The alarm should be generated when zxAnOpticalTemperature 
             exceeds this threshold.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalOfflineTrapEnable
oids.description:
Indicates whether optical module is online/offline traps should 
            be generated for this interface.

            By default, this object should have the value enabled(1) for
            interfaces which do not operate on 'top' of any other
            interface (as defined in the ifStackTable), and disabled(2)
            otherwise.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalModuleConfClass
oids.description: The optical module configured class.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalModuleAlmPrfRowStatus
oids.description: The row status of this entry.

oids.description: This table includes the optical module profile configuration.

oids.description: An entry in zxAnOpticalAlmPrfIfConfTable.

            optical module alarm threshold profile name .

oids.description: This table includes the ALS configuration of the optical module.

oids.description: An entry in zxAnOpticalAlsIfConfTable.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalModuleConfTable
oids.description: This table includes the optical module configuration.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalModuleConfEntry
oids.description: An entry in zxAnOpticalModuleConfTable.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalModuleConfVendorName
oids.description: The optical module vendor name.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalModuleConfVendorPn
oids.description: The optical module vendor P/N.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalModuleConfiguredClass
oids.description:
The optical module configured class. 
                         Includes the following:
                            GPON/B+,
                            GPON/C+,
                            GPON/EC+,
                            XGPON1/N1,
                            XGPON1/N2a,
                            EPON/PX20+,
                            10G-EPON/PRX30,
                            10G-EPON/PR30,
                            GPON/D,
                            XGS-PON/N1,
                            XGS-PON/N2,
                            XG-PON&GPON_COMBO/N1-B+,
                            XG-PON&GPON_COMB0/N2-C+,
                            GPON-OTDR/C+.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalModuleConfProperty
oids.description:
The property of the table record.
                         default: the default record, it can't be modified or 
                                  deleted by the user.
                         userDefined: the user-defined record.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalModuleConfTechNorms
oids.description: The optical module configured technical norms.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalModuleConfRowStatus
oids.description:
The status of this conceptual row.

             The supported actions of this conceptual row only include:
             'createAndGo' and 'destroy'. 

             To create a row in this table, a manager must set this object to 
             createAndGo(4), and must comply with the rule described in 
             zxAnLacpAggEntry.

             To delete a row in this table, a manager must set this object to 
             destroy(6).
             
             To get this object, the agent always returns active(1).

oids.name: zxAnOpticalModuleChanInfoTable
oids.description: This table includes the optical module channel information.

oids.description: An entry in zxAnOpticalModuleChanInfoTable.

oids.name: zxAnOpticalChanLaserSwitch
oids.description:
Enables or disables the laser function of the optical module 
             channel.
